item.title: Kubernetes Kubelet Security
item.author: Author
item.description: kubelet Port Port Description 10250 Serves API that allows full access 10255 Serves API that allows unauthenticated read-only access 10250 1 curl -sk https://localhost:10250/pods/ 1 curl -sk https://localhost:10255/metrics 10255 1 curl -sk https://localhost:10255/pods/ 1 curl -sk https://localhost:10255/metrics kubelet Authentication Anonymous kubelet.service 1 2 3 4 ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/kubelet \\ .
